items.title: A look at Aaru, a startup founded by teens that uses AI agents to simulate human responses for product development, polling, and more, recently valued at $1B (Suzanne Vranica/Wall Street Journal)
items.title_en: A look at Aaru, a startup founded by teens that uses AI agents to simulate human responses for product development, polling, and more, recently valued at $1B (Suzanne Vranica/Wall Street Journal)
items.title_zh: Aaru 是一家由青少年创立的初创公司，它使用人工智能代理来模拟人类反应以进行产品开发、投票等，最近估值为 10 亿美元（Suzanne Vranica/华尔街日报）
